name: Kurikurinku @Ignister
name_jp: クリクリンク<ruby lang="jp"><rb>＠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>イグニスター
desc: If this card is in your hand or GY (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 "@Ignister" monster; Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. When a card or effect is activated that targets a Cyberse monster(s) you control, and you control a Cyberse monster that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; negate that effect. You can only use each effect of "Kurikurinku @Ignister" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand or GY (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 "@Ignister" monster; Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. When a card or effect is activated that targets a Cyberse monster(s) you control, and you control a Cyberse monster that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; negate that effect. You can only use each effect of "Kurikurinku @Ignister" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your hand or GY (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 "@Ignister" monster; Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. When a card or effect is activated that targets a Cyberse monster(s) you control, and you control a Cyberse monster that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; negate that effect. You can only use each effect of "Kurikurinku @Ignister" once per turn.

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
